full_text:
Cell count 1):

total: 3 E6

live: 2,07 E6

viability: 69 %

size: 9.4 um

Cell count 2):

total: 2.97 E6

live: 2.19 E6

viability: 73.7 %

size: 9.0 um

Total cell count: n. 3 e6 / mL

Total volume: 2mL

A) RNA/DNA extraction (20 drops) + FFPE sample (4 drops) + Flow organoid (24 drops):

48-well plate

DNA/RNA + FFPE + flow: 48 wells x 40 µl x = 1920 µl → round up to 2000 uL (=1000ul x2)

1000 cells/µl = 2.0E6

→ make 2 x 1.5 ml eppendorfs, 1000 µl each

volume to take from cell suspension: 295uL

ORG full medium → 538 uL

ome-gel → 141 µl

aprotinin → 3 µl

thrombin → 3 µl

fibrinogen → 20 µl

→ Let it solidify for 60 min - add 350 uL medium

B) Drug treatment for IF:

384-well plate

Leave outer wells empty = in total plate 308 wells 308 wells x 20 µl = 6160 µl

1000 cells/µl = 6.16E6 cells

→ make 2x of 3500 uL on a reservoir

volume to take from cell suspension: uL

ORG full medium → uL

ome-gel → 1592.5 µl

aprotinin → 10.5 µl

thrombin → 10.5 µl

fibrinogen → 70 µl

→ Let it solidify for 40-60 min - add 25 uL medium

→ Next day add drugs using Tecan drug dispenser

D) Sample for Flow - Day 0

→ Collect 0.7 E6 cells (x 2 tubes) per 900 uL flow staining buffer for stained and unstained control

E) Sample for cryo

→ Collect 2.6 e6 cells per 1 mL stemcell banker (1x vial)

plate (1): For DNA & RNA & Flow & FFPE

Drops plated on 48 well suspension culture plates (CellStaar, #677102)

Day 4:

On day 4 cultures were processed for flow cytometry by Ashwini. Veera Vekasalo processed the cultures for DNA, RNA extraction and FFPE blocks.

Note: For flow cytometry, tumor-iPDO comparison antibody panel was used along with new compensation and unstained control.

Reagent | Stock concentration | Working concentration | Ratio
Omentum gel (BATCH 1) | 5.5 mg/mL | 2.5 mg/mL | 0.455
Aprotinin | 10 mg/mL | 33.3 ug/mL | 0.003
Thrombin | 100 U | 0.3 U | 0.003
Fibrinogen | 25 ug/mL | 0.5 ug/mL | 0.02

Flow (ab stain) | Flow (ab stain) | Flow (ab stain) | Flow (no stain) | DNA | DNA | RNA | RNA
Flow (ab stain) | Flow (ab stain) | Flow (ab stain) | Flow (no stain) | DNA | DNA | RNA | RNA
Flow (ab stain) | Flow (ab stain) | Flow (ab stain) | Flow (no stain) | FFPE | DNA | RNA | RNA
Flow (ab stain) | Flow (ab stain) | Flow (ab stain) | Flow (no stain) | FFPE | DNA | RNA | RNA
Flow (ab stain) | Flow (ab stain) | Flow (no stain) | Flow (no stain) | FFPE | DNA | DNA | RNA
Flow (ab stain) | Flow (ab stain) | Flow (no stain) | Flow (no stain) | FFPE | DNA | DNA | RNA
